description: Create a new Voicemail Box in the Vicidial Admin panel with the following configuration: Voicemail ID 8500, Voicemail Name WestCoast_Support, Password 4321, Email tickets@westcoast-support.com, Active set to Y, Delete Voicemail After Email set to Y (for the email-only workflow), and Voicemail Timezone set to America/Los_Angeles. Ensure all settings match exactly.
